changes.old: Increases 15% of skill DMG dealt at the start of each wave.
changes.new: Restores 12% HP to all allies at the start of each wave.

old.name: Dance of Flames
old.description: Increases 15% of DMG dealt at the start of each wave.

changes.old: Deals {value} DMG to all enemies, with a {probability} of inflicting Silence.
changes.new: Deals {value} DMG to the 2 enemies with the highest ATK, target receives {delay1} more DMG for a limited time.
